zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Arderne於1307年出生在英國爾阿爾萬利時，他的父親Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I41歲，母親Margaret ferch Gruffudd47歲。他於1334年與Matilda Stafford在英國波克夏波福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1360年8月10日在英國波克夏波福德享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Arderne于1307年出生在英国爾阿爾萬利时，他的父亲Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I41岁，母亲Margaret ferch Gruffudd47岁。他于1334年与Matilda Stafford在英国波克夏波福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1360年8月10日在英国波克夏波福德享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ardern
meanings: English: locative name variant of Arden . Arden in Cheshire is recorded as Arderne in 1260, and Arden in Warwicks is recorded as Arderne in 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Arderne was born in 1307, in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, was 41 and his mother, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, was 47. He married Matilda Stafford in 1334, in Boxford, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 10 August 1360, in Boxford, Berkshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Arderne est né en 1307, à Alvanley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Stafford en 1334, à Boxford, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 10 août 1360, à Boxford, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Arderne 1307 in Alvanley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I 41 und seine Mutter Margaret ferch Gruffudd 47. Er hat 1334 in Boxford, Berkshire, England Matilda Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 10. August 1360 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Boxford, Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Arderne è nato il nel 1307 nel Alvanley, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Stafford nel 1334, nel Boxford, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 10 agosto 1360, nel Boxford, Berkshire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Arderneが1307年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルヴァンリーで生まれた時，父Sir Knt. John d'Arderne Iは41歳，母Margaret ferch Gruffuddは47歳であった。1334年にイギリスバークシュアイアボクスフォードでMatilda Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1360年8月10日にイギリスバークシュアイアボクスフォードで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Arderne(이)가 1307년 영국 체실르 앨반리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret ferch Gruffudd(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1334년 영국 버크실르 보스퍼드에서 Matilda Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1360년 8월 10일 영국 버크실르 보스퍼드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Arderne nasceu em 1307, em Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Stafford em 1334, em Boxford, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1360, em Boxford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Arderne родился в 1307 г. в местности алванли, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret ferch Gruffudd, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Stafford в 1334 г. в местности боксфорд, биркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 10 августа 1360 г. в местности боксфорд, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Arderne nació en 1307, en Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Matilda Stafford en 1334, en Boxford, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1360, en Boxford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
